source.sqlReaderQuery:
--Select CAST(i.Type as VARCHAR) as DocumentType,CAST(g.ReferenceNumber as VARCHAR) as ReferenceNumber,CAST(i.PostingPeriod as VARCHAR) as PostingPeriod,CAST(i.ServicePeriod as VARCHAR) as ServicePeriod,
--CAST(i.VendorRef as VARCHAR) as VendorReference,CAST(g.CustomerVendor as VARCHAR) as VendorID,CAST(i.Description as VARCHAR) as VendorDescription,CAST(g.BranchCode as VARCHAR) as BranchCode,
--CAST(b.BranchName as VARCHAR) as BranchName,CAST(g.TransactionDescription as VARCHAR) as TransactionDescription,CAST(g.AccountCode as VARCHAR) as AccountCode,
--CAST(a.AccountDescription as VARCHAR) as AccountDescription,CAST(g.ProjectID as VARCHAR) as Project,CAST(g.SubAccount as VARCHAR) as SubAccount,
--CAST(LEFT(RIGHT(g.SubAccount,7),4) as VARCHAR) as MarketingSubAccount,CAST(smm.Description as VARCHAR) as SubAccountDescription,CAST(LEFT(RIGHT(g.SubAccount,11),4) as VARCHAR) as SourceGroup,
--CAST(smg.Description as VARCHAR) as SourceGroupDescription,g.CreditAmount,g.DebitAmount,g.BalanceAmount
--from EDW.FACT_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION g left join ODS.ERP_AP_INVOICE i on g.ReferenceNumber=i.ReferenceNbr
--left join EDW.DIM_ERP_ACCOUNT a on g.AccountCode=a.AccountCode
--left join EDW.DIM_ERP_BRANCH b on g.BranchCode=b.BranchCode
--left join (Select * from ODS.ERP_SUBACCOUNT_SEGMENT_MASTER where SegmentID='5') smm on LEFT(RIGHT(g.SubAccount,7),4)=smm.Value
--left join (Select * from ODS.ERP_SUBACCOUNT_SEGMENT_MASTER where SegmentID='4') smg on LEFT(RIGHT(g.SubAccount,11),4)=smg.Value
-- where --g.ReferenceNumber='793898' and
--g.Module='AP' and i.ServicePeriod>='012024'



--Select CAST(i.Type as VARCHAR) as DocumentType,CAST(g.ReferenceNumber as VARCHAR) as ReferenceNumber,CAST(g.FinPeriodID as VARCHAR) as PostingPeriod,CAST(i.ServicePeriod as VARCHAR) as ServicePeriod,
--CAST(i.VendorRef as VARCHAR) as VendorReference,CAST(g.CustomerVendor as VARCHAR) as VendorID,CAST(v.VendorName as VARCHAR) as VendorDescription,CAST(smv.Description as VARCHAR) as SourceVendor,
--CAST(g.BranchCode as VARCHAR) as BranchCode,CAST(b.BranchName as VARCHAR) as BranchName,CAST(g.TransactionDescription as VARCHAR) as TransactionDescription,
--CAST(g.AccountCode as VARCHAR) as AccountCode,CAST(a.AccountDescription as VARCHAR) as AccountDescription,CAST(g.ProjectID as VARCHAR) as Project,
--CAST(g.SubAccount as VARCHAR) as SubAccount,CAST(LEFT(RIGHT(g.SubAccount,7),4) as VARCHAR) as MarketingSubAccount,CAST(smm.Description as VARCHAR) as SubAccountDescription,
--CAST(RIGHT(LEFT(g.SubAccount,6),3) as VARCHAR) as SourceGroup,CAST(smg.Description as VARCHAR) as SourceGroupDescription,
--CAST(LEFT(RIGHT(g.SubAccount,11),4) as VARCHAR) as DepartmentID,CAST(smd.Description as VARCHAR) as DepartmentDescription,g.CreditAmount,g.DebitAmount,g.BalanceAmount
--from EDW.FACT_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION g left join ODS.ERP_AP_INVOICE i on g.ReferenceNumber=i.ReferenceNbr
--left join EDW.DIM_ERP_ACCOUNT a on g.AccountCode=a.AccountCode
--left join EDW.DIM_ERP_BRANCH b on g.BranchCode=b.BranchCode
--left join EDW.DIM_ERP_VENDOR v  on g.CustomerVendor=v.VendorID
--left join (Select * from ODS.ERP_SUBACCOUNT_SEGMENT_MASTER where SegmentID='5') smm on LEFT(RIGHT(g.SubAccount,7),4)=smm.Value
--left join (Select * from ODS.ERP_SUBACCOUNT_SEGMENT_MASTER where SegmentID='2') smg on RIGHT(LEFT(g.SubAccount,6),3)=smg.Value
--left join (Select * from ODS.ERP_SUBACCOUNT_SEGMENT_MASTER where SegmentID='4') smd on LEFT(RIGHT(g.SubAccount,11),4)=smd.Value
--left join (Select * from ODS.ERP_SUBACCOUNT_SEGMENT_MASTER where SegmentID='3') smv on RIGHT(LEFT(g.SubAccount,9),3)=smv.Value
-- where --g.ReferenceNumber='793181' and
--g.Module='AP' and (CAST(LEFT(g.FinPeriodID,2) as INT)>=01 and CAST(RIGHT(g.FinPeriodID,4) as INT)>=2024) 
----and CAST(LEFT(g.FinPeriodID,2) as INT)!=CAST(LEFT(i.PostingPeriod,2) as INT)
--order by g.FinPeriodID


Select CAST(g.[Module] as VARCHAR) as ModuleType,CAST(i.Type as VARCHAR) as DocumentType,CAST(g.ReferenceNumber as VARCHAR) as ReferenceNumber,CAST(g.BatchNumber as VARCHAR) as BatchNumber ,CAST(g.FinPeriodID as VARCHAR) as PostingPeriod,CAST(i.ServicePeriod as VARCHAR) as ServicePeriod,
CAST(i.VendorRef as VARCHAR) as VendorReference,CAST(g.CustomerVendor as VARCHAR) as VendorID,CAST(v.VendorName as VARCHAR) as VendorDescription,CAST(smv.Description as VARCHAR) as SourceVendor,
CAST(g.BranchCode as VARCHAR) as BranchCode,CAST(b.BranchName as VARCHAR) as BranchName,CAST(g.TransactionDescription as VARCHAR) as TransactionDescription,
CAST(g.AccountCode as VARCHAR) as AccountCode,CAST(a.AccountDescription as VARCHAR(1000)) as AccountDescription,CAST(g.ProjectID as VARCHAR) as Project,
CAST(g.SubAccount as VARCHAR) as SubAccount,CAST(LEFT(RIGHT(g.SubAccount,7),4) as VARCHAR) as MarketingSubAccount,CAST(smm.Description as VARCHAR) as SubAccountDescription,
CAST(RIGHT(LEFT(g.SubAccount,6),3) as VARCHAR) as SourceGroup,CAST(smg.Description as VARCHAR) as SourceGroupDescription,
CAST(LEFT(RIGHT(g.SubAccount,11),4) as VARCHAR) as DepartmentID,CAST(smd.Description as VARCHAR) as DepartmentDescription,g.CreditAmount,g.DebitAmount,g.BalanceAmount
from EDW.FACT_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION g left join ODS.ERP_AP_INVOICE i on g.ReferenceNumber=i.ReferenceNbr
left join EDW.DIM_ERP_ACCOUNT a on g.AccountCode=a.AccountCode
left join EDW.DIM_ERP_BRANCH b on g.BranchCode=b.BranchCode
left join EDW.DIM_ERP_VENDOR v  on g.CustomerVendor=v.VendorID
left join (Select * from ODS.ERP_SUBACCOUNT_SEGMENT_MASTER where SegmentID='5') smm on LEFT(RIGHT(g.SubAccount,7),4)=smm.Value
left join (Select * from ODS.ERP_SUBACCOUNT_SEGMENT_MASTER where SegmentID='2') smg on RIGHT(LEFT(g.SubAccount,6),3)=smg.Value
left join (Select * from ODS.ERP_SUBACCOUNT_SEGMENT_MASTER where SegmentID='4') smd on LEFT(RIGHT(g.SubAccount,11),4)=smd.Value
left join (Select * from ODS.ERP_SUBACCOUNT_SEGMENT_MASTER where SegmentID='3') smv on RIGHT(LEFT(g.SubAccount,9),3)=smv.Value
 where --g.ReferenceNumber='793181' and
g.Module='AP' AND CAST(CONCAT(RIGHT(g.FinPeriodID,4),'-',LEFT(g.FinPeriodID,2),'-01') as DATE) >= CAST(DATEADD(month, DATEDIFF(month, 0, GETDATE()) - 2, 0) as DATE)
AND CAST(CONCAT(RIGHT(g.FinPeriodID,4),'-',LEFT(g.FinPeriodID,2),'-01') as DATE) <= CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)
and i.Type not in ('QCK','VQC')


UNION ALL

Select CAST(g.[Module] as VARCHAR) as ModuleType,NULL as DocumentType,ISNULL(CAST(g.ReferenceNumber as VARCHAR),'-9999') as ReferenceNumber,CAST(g.BatchNumber as VARCHAR) as BatchNumber, CAST(g.FinPeriodID as VARCHAR) as PostingPeriod,CAST(g.ServicePeriod as VARCHAR) as ServicePeriod,
NULL as VendorReference,CAST(g.CustomerVendor as VARCHAR) as VendorID,CAST(v.VendorName as VARCHAR) as VendorDescription,CAST(smv.Description as VARCHAR) as SourceVendor,
CAST(g.BranchCode as VARCHAR) as BranchCode,CAST(b.BranchName as VARCHAR) as BranchName,CAST(g.TransactionDescription as VARCHAR) as TransactionDescription,
CAST(g.AccountCode as VARCHAR) as AccountCode,CAST(a.AccountDescription as VARCHAR(1000)) as AccountDescription,CAST(g.ProjectID as VARCHAR) as Project,
CAST(g.SubAccount as VARCHAR) as SubAccount,CAST(LEFT(RIGHT(g.SubAccount,7),4) as VARCHAR) as MarketingSubAccount,CAST(smm.Description as VARCHAR) as SubAccountDescription,
CAST(RIGHT(LEFT(g.SubAccount,6),3) as VARCHAR) as SourceGroup,CAST(smg.Description as VARCHAR) as SourceGroupDescription,
CAST(LEFT(RIGHT(g.SubAccount,11),4) as VARCHAR) as DepartmentID,CAST(smd.Description as VARCHAR) as DepartmentDescription,g.CreditAmount,g.DebitAmount,g.BalanceAmount
from EDW.FACT_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION g left join ODS.ERP_AP_INVOICE i on g.ReferenceNumber=i.ReferenceNbr
left join EDW.DIM_ERP_ACCOUNT a on g.AccountCode=a.AccountCode
left join EDW.DIM_ERP_BRANCH b on g.BranchCode=b.BranchCode
left join EDW.DIM_ERP_VENDOR v  on g.CustomerVendor=v.VendorID
left join (Select * from ODS.ERP_SUBACCOUNT_SEGMENT_MASTER where SegmentID='5') smm on LEFT(RIGHT(g.SubAccount,7),4)=smm.Value
left join (Select * from ODS.ERP_SUBACCOUNT_SEGMENT_MASTER where SegmentID='2') smg on RIGHT(LEFT(g.SubAccount,6),3)=smg.Value
left join (Select * from ODS.ERP_SUBACCOUNT_SEGMENT_MASTER where SegmentID='4') smd on LEFT(RIGHT(g.SubAccount,11),4)=smd.Value
left join (Select * from ODS.ERP_SUBACCOUNT_SEGMENT_MASTER where SegmentID='3') smv on RIGHT(LEFT(g.SubAccount,9),3)=smv.Value
 where --g.ReferenceNumber='793181' and
g.Module='GL' AND CAST(CONCAT(RIGHT(g.FinPeriodID,4),'-',LEFT(g.FinPeriodID,2),'-01') as DATE) >= CAST(DATEADD(month, DATEDIFF(month, 0, GETDATE()) - 2, 0) as DATE) 
AND CAST(CONCAT(RIGHT(g.FinPeriodID,4),'-',LEFT(g.FinPeriodID,2),'-01') as DATE) <= CAST(GETDATE() as DATE) and g.BatchNumber not in ('2518243','2518632','2597649')
--and CAST(LEFT(g.FinPeriodID,2) as INT)!=CAST(LEFT(i.PostingPeriod,2) as INT)
--order by g.FinPeriodID

UNION ALL


Select CAST(g.[Module] as VARCHAR) as ModuleType,NULL as DocumentType,ISNULL(CAST(g.ReferenceNumber as VARCHAR),'-9999') as ReferenceNumber,CAST(g.BatchNumber as VARCHAR) as BatchNumber, CAST(g.FinPeriodID as VARCHAR) as PostingPeriod,CAST(g.ServicePeriod as VARCHAR) as ServicePeriod,
NULL as VendorReference,CAST(g.CustomerVendor as VARCHAR) as VendorID,CAST(v.VendorName as VARCHAR) as VendorDescription,CAST(smv.Description as VARCHAR) as SourceVendor,
CAST(g.BranchCode as VARCHAR) as BranchCode,CAST(b.BranchName as VARCHAR) as BranchName,CAST(g.TransactionDescription as VARCHAR) as TransactionDescription,
CAST(g.AccountCode as VARCHAR) as AccountCode,CAST(a.AccountDescription as VARCHAR(1000)) as AccountDescription,CAST(g.ProjectID as VARCHAR) as Project,
CAST(g.SubAccount as VARCHAR) as SubAccount,CAST(LEFT(RIGHT(g.SubAccount,7),4) as VARCHAR) as MarketingSubAccount,CAST(smm.Description as VARCHAR) as SubAccountDescription,
CAST(RIGHT(LEFT(g.SubAccount,6),3) as VARCHAR) as SourceGroup,CAST(smg.Description as VARCHAR) as SourceGroupDescription,
CAST(LEFT(RIGHT(g.SubAccount,11),4) as VARCHAR) as DepartmentID,CAST(smd.Description as VARCHAR) as DepartmentDescription,g.CreditAmount,g.DebitAmount,g.BalanceAmount
from EDW.FACT_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION g left join ODS.ERP_AP_INVOICE i on g.ReferenceNumber=i.ReferenceNbr
left join EDW.DIM_ERP_ACCOUNT a on g.AccountCode=a.AccountCode
left join EDW.DIM_ERP_BRANCH b on g.BranchCode=b.BranchCode
left join EDW.DIM_ERP_VENDOR v  on g.CustomerVendor=v.VendorID
left join (Select * from ODS.ERP_SUBACCOUNT_SEGMENT_MASTER where SegmentID='5') smm on LEFT(RIGHT(g.SubAccount,7),4)=smm.Value
left join (Select * from ODS.ERP_SUBACCOUNT_SEGMENT_MASTER where SegmentID='2') smg on RIGHT(LEFT(g.SubAccount,6),3)=smg.Value
left join (Select * from ODS.ERP_SUBACCOUNT_SEGMENT_MASTER where SegmentID='4') smd on LEFT(RIGHT(g.SubAccount,11),4)=smd.Value
left join (Select * from ODS.ERP_SUBACCOUNT_SEGMENT_MASTER where SegmentID='3') smv on RIGHT(LEFT(g.SubAccount,9),3)=smv.Value
 where --g.BatchNumber='2537165' and
g.Module='PM' AND CAST(CONCAT(RIGHT(g.FinPeriodID,4),'-',LEFT(g.FinPeriodID,2),'-01') as DATE) >= CAST(DATEADD(month, DATEDIFF(month, 0, GETDATE()) - 2, 0) as DATE) 
AND CAST(CONCAT(RIGHT(g.FinPeriodID,4),'-',LEFT(g.FinPeriodID,2),'-01') as DATE) <= CAST(GETDATE() as DATE)

UNION ALL

Select CAST(g.[Module] as VARCHAR) as ModuleType,NULL as DocumentType,ISNULL(CAST(g.ReferenceNumber as VARCHAR),'-9999') as ReferenceNumber,CAST(g.BatchNumber as VARCHAR) as BatchNumber, CAST(g.FinPeriodID as VARCHAR) as PostingPeriod,CAST(g.ServicePeriod as VARCHAR) as ServicePeriod,
NULL as VendorReference,CAST(g.CustomerVendor as VARCHAR) as VendorID,CAST(v.VendorName as VARCHAR) as VendorDescription,CAST(smv.Description as VARCHAR) as SourceVendor,
CAST(g.BranchCode as VARCHAR) as BranchCode,CAST(b.BranchName as VARCHAR) as BranchName,CAST(g.TransactionDescription as VARCHAR) as TransactionDescription,
CAST(g.AccountCode as VARCHAR) as AccountCode,CAST(a.AccountDescription as VARCHAR(1000)) as AccountDescription,CAST(g.ProjectID as VARCHAR) as Project,
CAST(g.SubAccount as VARCHAR) as SubAccount,CAST(LEFT(RIGHT(g.SubAccount,7),4) as VARCHAR) as MarketingSubAccount,CAST(smm.Description as VARCHAR) as SubAccountDescription,
CAST(RIGHT(LEFT(g.SubAccount,6),3) as VARCHAR) as SourceGroup,CAST(smg.Description as VARCHAR) as SourceGroupDescription,
CAST(LEFT(RIGHT(g.SubAccount,11),4) as VARCHAR) as DepartmentID,CAST(smd.Description as VARCHAR) as DepartmentDescription,g.CreditAmount,g.DebitAmount,g.BalanceAmount
from EDW.FACT_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION g left join ODS.ERP_AP_INVOICE i on g.ReferenceNumber=i.ReferenceNbr
left join EDW.DIM_ERP_ACCOUNT a on g.AccountCode=a.AccountCode
left join EDW.DIM_ERP_BRANCH b on g.BranchCode=b.BranchCode
left join EDW.DIM_ERP_VENDOR v  on g.CustomerVendor=v.VendorID
left join (Select * from ODS.ERP_SUBACCOUNT_SEGMENT_MASTER where SegmentID='5') smm on LEFT(RIGHT(g.SubAccount,7),4)=smm.Value
left join (Select * from ODS.ERP_SUBACCOUNT_SEGMENT_MASTER where SegmentID='2') smg on RIGHT(LEFT(g.SubAccount,6),3)=smg.Value
left join (Select * from ODS.ERP_SUBACCOUNT_SEGMENT_MASTER where SegmentID='4') smd on LEFT(RIGHT(g.SubAccount,11),4)=smd.Value
left join (Select * from ODS.ERP_SUBACCOUNT_SEGMENT_MASTER where SegmentID='3') smv on RIGHT(LEFT(g.SubAccount,9),3)=smv.Value
 where --g.BatchNumber='2537165' and
g.Module='CA' AND CAST(CONCAT(RIGHT(g.FinPeriodID,4),'-',LEFT(g.FinPeriodID,2),'-01') as DATE) >= CAST(DATEADD(month, DATEDIFF(month, 0, GETDATE()) - 2, 0) as DATE)
AND CAST(CONCAT(RIGHT(g.FinPeriodID,4),'-',LEFT(g.FinPeriodID,2),'-01') as DATE) <= CAST(GETDATE() as DATE) and i.Type not in ('QCK','VQC')




--AND CAST(CONCAT(RIGHT(g.FinPeriodID,4),'-',LEFT(g.FinPeriodID,2),'-01') as DATE) >= '2024-09-01'
--AND CAST(CONCAT(RIGHT(g.FinPeriodID,4),'-',LEFT(g.FinPeriodID,2),'-01') as DATE) < CAST(DATEADD(month, DATEDIFF(month, 0, GETDATE()), 0) as DATE)

sink.preCopyScript: Delete from EDW.REPORT_ERP_AP_BILLS_ADJUSTMENTS_DETAIL where CAST(CONCAT(RIGHT(PostingPeriod,4),'-',LEFT(PostingPeriod,2),'-01') as DATE) >= CAST(DATEADD(month, DATEDIFF(month, 0, GETDATE()) - 2, 0) as DATE)
